mnemonics: Smart Contracts are self-executing contracts with the terms of the agreement directly written into lines of code
keyPoints: Ethereum is an open-source blockchain platform with a decentralized network of nodes.
The Ethereum stack includes the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM),gas, and the blockchain.
Transactions on the Ethereum blockchain are verified by nodes and added to the blockchain through a process called consensus.
Ethereum 1.0 (Fork) removed private accounts, and transitioned to the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) as the primary smart contract platform.
Ethereum 2.0 is a major upgrade to the Ethereum network, focusing on scalability, security, and usability.
